title: So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I
description: Agreement expressions. When to say 'So do I / Me too / Neither do I / Me neither' and what they really mean.
summary_pt_br: Como concordar em inglês. Afirmativa: So + auxiliar + sujeito ('So do I', 'So am I'). Me too (informal). Negativa: Neither + auxiliar + sujeito ('Neither do I'). Me neither (informal). Nunca 'Me too' em frase negativa.

scenes.text_en:
'I love tacos,' said Rafa.
'SO DO I,' said Bia. 'ME TOO,' said Maya. Same meaning.
'I don't like lukewarm coffee,' said Joca.
'NEITHER DO I,' said Zara. 'ME NEITHER,' said Rafa. Same again.
But if you mix them up, you sound funny.
scenes.text_pt:
'Eu amo taco,' disse o Rafa.
'EU TAMBÉM' (formal: SO DO I / informal: ME TOO), disseram Bia e Maya.
'Não gosto de café morno,' disse o Joca.
'NEM EU' (formal: NEITHER DO I / informal: ME NEITHER), disseram Zara e Rafa.
Misturar = soar estranho.

scenes.title: Formula — match the auxiliary
scenes.body_en: SO / NEITHER + auxiliary + subject. The auxiliary matches the original verb: 'I am' → So AM I / Neither AM I. 'I have' → So HAVE I. 'I eat' → So DO I. 'I went' → So DID I. 'I will' → So WILL I. TRAP: NEVER say 'Me too' after a negative ('I don't eat meat. Me too' = WRONG; say 'Me neither').
scenes.body_pt: Formula: SO/NEITHER + auxiliar + sujeito. Auxiliar bate com o verbo original: 'I am' → So am I. 'I eat' → So do I. 'I will' → So will I. PEGADINHA: Nunca 'Me too' depois de negativa. 'I don't like it → Me neither' (certo) ou 'Neither do I' (certo). 'Me too' aí é errado.

examples.en: I play guitar → So do I.
I can't swim → Neither can I.

exercise.question: 'I can't swim.' → '___.' (agree)
exercise.explanation: Negative agreement formal = NEITHER + matching auxiliary. 'Can't' → 'Neither CAN I'.

pairs: I love it → So do I
I don't like it → Neither do I
I am happy → So am I
I can sing → So can I
exercise.explanation: Five patterns. The auxiliary always mirrors the original.
